summary: A reflexive-control analysis chamber for influence, perception management, and adversarial shaping of judgment.
final_use_case: It makes influence analysis operational: not merely who said what, but how perception is shaped into action and how a chamber could preserve that reasoning for review, simulation, and export.

instruments.instrument_name: Reflexive Control Chamber — Russian reflexive-control & strategic-deception research chamber Artifact Identity Register
instruments.input: packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination
instruments.operation: A reflexive-control analysis chamber for influence, perception management, and adversarial shaping of judgment.
instruments.output: what the packet is and what decision it can still change
instruments.upstream_dependency: Requires packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination
instruments.downstream_use: Feeds what the packet is and what decision it can still change; later claims should not rely on this step until its expected output is present.
instruments.proof: Expected proof artifact: what the packet is and what decision it can still change
instruments.status: Status: Pass 3 of 3 is complete and self-declared handoff-complete. Sixty files at 110 KB compressed (~287 KB uncompressed): 32 numbered docs running from.
instruments.gap: Verify one representative case: the step should accept packet name, source files, version signal, scope, and intended destination and produce what the packet is and what decision it can still change.
instruments.verification_check: Trace one Russia claim through Reflexive Control Chamber — Russian reflexive-control & strategic-deception research chamber Artifact Identity Register; confirm source lane, analytic variable, confidence boundary, and policy-facing output.

instruments.instrument_name: Reflexive Control Chamber — Russian reflexive-control & strategic-deception research chamber Proof Boundary
instruments.input: built assets, partial assets, archive-only assets, and unsupported claims
instruments.operation: Pass 3 of 3 is complete and self-declared handoff-complete. Sixty files at 110 KB compressed (~287 KB uncompressed): 32 numbered docs running from 00_STATUS through 31_CHECKSUMS, the canonical YAML object schema, four machine-readable contracts, nine SVG diagrams, a working HTML preview, design tokens (CSS + JSON), QA case CSVs, and four sample-data JSON files. The most architecturally mature page handoff in the larger MuranoOS bundle. The package is honest about scope: the working HTML preview demonstrates the.

instruments.instrument_name: Reflexive Control Chamber — Russian reflexive-control & strategic-deception research chamber Promotion Route
instruments.input: website room, MuranoOS room, Nexus task, paper, source bank, or archive
instruments.operation: The forward path moves the chamber from spec-and-preview to live runtime, then exercises the full discipline against a real reflexive-control research case. The handoff is structurally complete; what is coming is operational use. Step 01 Live MuranoOS integration Wire the four machine-readable contracts into the MuranoOS desktop runtime; implement the eighteen-object data model in the SQLite persistence layer; integrate the radial-axial topology into the page shell. Step 02 First real case First reflexive-control.
